items.title: 5 Dividend Powerhouses That Belong in Every Retirement Portfolio Right Now
items.description: For investors approaching or in retirement, the right stock portfolio balances reliable income, low volatility, and consistent dividend growth. Among six prominent dividend-paying stocks, five stand out for their financial stability, income generation, and defensive characteristics that help retirees navigate market turbulence. items.title: McDonald’s (MCD) Grinch Meal Buzz and New Pricing Strategy: What It Could Mean for the Stock’s Valuation
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) just kicked off December with a one two punch: a Grinch themed holiday meal that is selling out in spots and a systemwide reset of how franchisees think about pricing and value. See our latest analysis for McDonald's. That combination of holiday buzz and tighter value controls is landing against a backdrop of steady, if not explosive, momentum, with a roughly mid single digit year to date share price return and a multi year total shareholder return that still comfortably...
